\cventryplain{Co-Founder and President of Latin American Engineering Society}{September 2022 -- Present}
  {Northgate University of Technology}{Millbrook, OH}{%
  \item Identified the need for a dedicated community organization for Latin American graduate engineering students
  \item Assembled a four-member founding board and secured a faculty advisor and university departmental sponsorship
  \item Raised operating funds and recruited members from across the College of Engineering
  \item Organized professional development workshops, cultural events, and networking sessions with industry partners
}%
